subcodes.first_line: In this day the Proof proclaimeth its call, and the Evidence declareth "Verily, the All-Merciful is come!", and the Testament showeth forth the Way, yet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز حجت ندا مینماید و برهان قد اتی الرحمن میگوید و دلیل سبیل مینماید ولکن
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @rejection, opposition and persecution
